name: fad-network
description: Fund an Athlete's Dream (FAD) — the world's most transparent athlete funding network.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix app" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run script:rules:check && npm run script:sync:all && npm run build --prefix common && npm run build --prefix app && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --prefix common && npm run type-check --prefix app && npm run type-check --prefix client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix app && npm run lint --prefix client
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --prefix app && npm run lint:fix --prefix client
scripts.ci: npm run type-check && npm run lint:fix && npm run build
scripts.postinstall:
echo '
Installing common...' && npm --prefix common install && echo '
Installing app...' && npm --prefix app install && echo '
Installing client...' && npm --prefix client install
scripts.script:sync:all: npm run script:agents:sync && npm run script:skills:sync && npm run script:skills:check
